diagrams.name: user_registration_flow
diagrams.title: User Registration Flow
diagrams.description: New user submits registration form; servlet validates and persists user, then sends confirmation email

diagrams.name: user_login_logout_flow
diagrams.title: User Login and Logout Flow
diagrams.description: User submits credentials; servlet authenticates via service and session, then logout clears the session

diagrams.name: product_management_flow
diagrams.title: Admin Product Management Flow
diagrams.description: Admin adds, updates, or removes products; servlets delegate to ProductServiceImpl which reads/writes via DBUtil and serves images

diagrams.name: cart_management_flow
diagrams.title: Shopping Cart Management Flow
diagrams.description: Customer adds items to cart, updates quantities, and removes items; coordinated through CartServiceImpl and CartBean

diagrams.name: order_payment_flow
diagrams.title: Order Placement and Payment Flow
diagrams.description: Customer places order; OrderServlet triggers payment, order/transaction persistence, ID generation, and transaction confirmation email

diagrams.name: shipment_and_demand_notification_flow
diagrams.title: Shipment and Demand Notification Flow
diagrams.description: Admin ships an order; ShipmentServlet updates order status and triggers email to customer; demand subscribers are notified when product becomes available
diagrams.scope: Shipment dispatch and product availability notifications
